review: This app is such trash. its so glitchy, one day it works and the next it refuses to clear offers from code, or reset the code, or fail to load the offers, i could keep going but id run out of space. Fix the app or get rid of it. And yes i always have a good signal when using the app.
cannot get my code so can't use the app
perfect

Layout is okay. Giving 2 stars because I can't have a friend pick up my order without giving them my phone. Extremely inconvenient. Update on June 24, 2026: Too many steps required to do simple tasks. The app also doesn't make it easy to see if an order has been placed or if more info is needed. Very frustrating!

has to be among the worst made apps out there. takes way too long to load, a constant reminder not to drive while using it, well duh. it's been helpful though in other ways. I no longer eat your so-called food.
won't accept your email no matter how hard you try you can't do anything without your email not even look at the prices of things stupid app worthless
Use other apps to order because this one forces you to uninstall and reinstall after 2 orders
love it so tasty and the fries are so crispy and love to come again

the coupons often doesnt work one of the reason is it says its not available at this time of day but i know when is breakfast the second one i had was buy a mcflurry get a snack wrap for free the otptikns where both mcflurry so it did not let me take the coupon

Hilarious incompetence. New phone, I tap the login link and get Login or Sign Up. I have an existing account so I enter my e-mail address. The app responds "Account already exists. Please try again." No kidding, that's the one I'm trying to log into! But the app only goes down the new-user route (despite the Login *or* Sign Up message). No other way to try and log in, so bye-bye points!
buggy as f
unable to use app. would not allow me to put in location

Awful. Tried to sign in, prompted email sign in. Clicked the link, won't sign in, can't use my account. Absolute waste of time. Edit: Had to open the link to the app in a new tab for it to work. Edit 2 (June 21st, 2026): After about a month of working, I've been signed out of the app and opening a new tab doesn't work.
Navigating the app is frustrating. Always being asked for add ons on every order. Options and notes don't make any sense. My wife had made the order at the counter before the app was loaded.
app fails to start often, been charged for food I didn't order. I've also had difficulty paying online. updates have made it worse. I gave it 5 stars previously but had to delete that one.

Please add a "reset code" option. It has happened often enough that it ruins the app experience. It gives me a code, it doesn't work, but keeps giving me the same code. The only way to fix it is by restarting my phone twice. It's just stupid.

Would be great if it supports "approximate location services" as introduced in Android 12 rather than persisting on requesting user's precise location. The app doesn't need to know where exactly I am, just which area I'm in, in order to find a McD location near me. slow
again this app is so broken it never places an order I always have to reinstall it to get the order placement to work... missing the breakfast window again thanks to your app being buggy as usual.
great

faken garbage app. super laggy and it doesn't work properly most of the time

absolutely doo. my 4 year old phone to old to use the app

Updated to say that the app has been working fine since 2021. Though there was one time that I got charged twice for the same order. I had to uninstall the app in spring 2021 as it kept telling me I had an offer loaded, but there was no way to remove it and I could not see what the offer was. July 2021, the app has stopped working completely, it loads but then freezes and you can't order anything at all.
App wont let me login on android. Was looking up resolutions on reddit, saw people complaining about the same glitch 3 years ago... for a multi billion dollar company that's pretty sad.

you want to do something good for all of the people who use your app then make sure that you're update doesn't have to be forced upon while you're in line when you're in the middle of ordering while there's a whole bunch of vehicles behind you.. allow it to be an option to update later otherwise you're going to cause a lot of difficulties like you just did for me 20 minutes wasted I had to get out of the lineup had to go park my vehicle had to sit here and sort it out.

7am cant order eggs "because we did it" the lady said three times. even after trying to ask what that meant i still dont know but i couldnt order breakfast at 7am. i biked here specifically for an offer on the app and then found out they arent selling breakfast this morning ehich means the app didnt work as it said i can get an egg wrap. 0/10 service and satisfaction. i am home 30min later emty stomach and extremely mad at this company.

Used to be a good app. Was by far the best of any major chain restaurant. I liked the ease of use, the simplicity of pickup options, and the auto-charging to my credit card. But for god's sake, stop telling me not to text and drive every time I log into the app. When this is removed, I'll restore the 5 stars. Allow functionality to remove the McDelivery. I don't want to see it. I'll never use it. Stop pushing it. Remove the 'Exclusive Add-on'. This dirties an otherwise clean app.

Very frustrating experience. The app was working perfectly fine, and then suddenly I could no longer scan my code at the restaurant. I have tried deleting and reinstalling the app, clearing the cache, logging out and back in, and restarting my phone, but nothing has fixed the problem. Because of this issue, I was unable to use my offers and rewards when ordering. There was no warning, explanation, or error message explaining what went wrong.
